scenarios.name: SaaS idea evaluation (LinkedIn outreach automation)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline recommends building an MVP after light competitor research and a TAM analysis without demanding manual processizing or naming 10 specific people; treatment defines the precise ICP, demands current workaround and 10/3 conversation thresholds, applies processize-manually-first, calls out red flags, and ends with a Needs-more-validation verdict and manual-first next steps.

scenarios.name: Niche tool idea (team Pomodoro for remote workers)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests waitlists, surveys, and a 2-week MVP without rejecting friends-as-validation or pushing manual sales; treatment names red flags (friends-cool, not-in-community, no existing workarounds), demands 10 named people and 3 paid manual customers, and delivers a Pivot verdict with concrete manual-first steps.
